schema_version.description: Schema version. Do not modify manually.

analyzed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this analysis was performed.

analyzed_commit.description: Full SHA of the commit that was analyzed.

analyzed_by.description: Identifier of the agent/tool that performed analysis.

path.description: Path to documentation file relative to repository root. Example: "docs/architecture.md"

title.description: Title extracted from document header or filename. Example: "System Architecture Overview"

purpose.description: Brief description of what this document covers.

quality.description: Assessment of documentation quality and completeness.

last_modified.description: Last modification date if available (from git or file metadata). Format: YYYY-MM-DD

audiences.description: Intended audiences for this document. Examples: "developers", "operators", "end-users", "contributors", "ai-agents"

appears_ai_generated.description: Whether this document appears to have been generated by an AI process. Signals: generation timestamps, "compiled from CLAUDE.md", ceremony output markers, "generated by" statements. Omit if no signal.

root_readme.description: Main README file at repository root. Null if not found.

path.description: Path to documentation file relative to repository root. Example: "docs/architecture.md"

title.description: Title extracted from document header or filename. Example: "System Architecture Overview"

purpose.description: Brief description of what this document covers.

quality.description: Assessment of documentation quality and completeness.

last_modified.description: Last modification date if available (from git or file metadata). Format: YYYY-MM-DD

audiences.description: Intended audiences for this document. Examples: "developers", "operators", "end-users", "contributors", "ai-agents"

appears_ai_generated.description: Whether this document appears to have been generated by an AI process. Signals: generation timestamps, "compiled from CLAUDE.md", ceremony output markers, "generated by" statements. Omit if no signal.

root_docs.description: Documentation files at repository root level (excluding README). Examples: CONTRIBUTING.md, CHANGELOG.md, LICENSE

path.description: Path to documentation directory relative to repository root. Examples: "docs/", "docs/products/ink-weaver/", "docs/field-guide/"

name.description: Section name or title. Examples: "Product Documentation", "Field Guide", "User Guide", "Architecture"

description.description: Brief description of what this section contains.

path.description: Path to documentation file relative to repository root. Example: "docs/architecture.md"

title.description: Title extracted from document header or filename. Example: "System Architecture Overview"

purpose.description: Brief description of what this document covers.

quality.description: Assessment of documentation quality and completeness.

last_modified.description: Last modification date if available (from git or file metadata). Format: YYYY-MM-DD

audiences.description: Intended audiences for this document. Examples: "developers", "operators", "end-users", "contributors", "ai-agents"

appears_ai_generated.description: Whether this document appears to have been generated by an AI process. Signals: generation timestamps, "compiled from CLAUDE.md", ceremony output markers, "generated by" statements. Omit if no signal.

has_legacy_subfolder.description: Whether this section contains a .legacy/ or legacy/ subfolder with deprecated docs.

metrics.description: Volume and temporal metrics for this section.

file_count.description: Number of documentation files in this scope.

line_count.description: Total lines across all documentation files in this scope.

last_commit_date.description: Date of the most recent commit touching files in this scope. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

last_commit_sha.description: Short SHA of the most recent commit touching files in this scope.

doc_sections.description: Documentation organized by section/folder. Includes docs/, docs/products/, docs/field-guide/, docs/user-guide/, and similar.

has_field_guide.description: Has a field guide (single or multi-file)

has_glossary.description: Has a glossary or terminology document

readme_count.description: Total number of README.md files found across the entire repository. High counts can signal well-structured or over-documented repos.

github_pages_url.description: GitHub Pages URL if detected in README or repo configuration. Null if not found. Do not follow the URL — just record it.

gaps.description: Structural documentation gaps observed. Examples: "No root README", "No architecture documentation", "No glossary". Report observable gaps only — do not prescribe what should exist.

patterns.description: Documentation patterns observed. Examples: "Field guide compiled from CLAUDE.md files", "Product-centric hierarchy (docs/products/{name}/)", "index.md used as navigation hubs", "Discovery folders for investigations"

metrics.description: Aggregate volume and temporal metrics across all conceptual documentation. Totals across all sections and root docs.

file_count.description: Number of documentation files in this scope.

line_count.description: Total lines across all documentation files in this scope.

last_commit_date.description: Date of the most recent commit touching files in this scope. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

last_commit_sha.description: Short SHA of the most recent commit touching files in this scope.

notes.description: Additional observations, assumptions, or mismatches discovered during analysis. Document any ambiguity in classification that could not be resolved. Note any documentation that appears AI-generated and the signals observed.

description: Repository conceptual documentation analysis output (v1.2.0). Catalogs README files, field guides, glossaries, architecture docs, user guides, and assesses coverage. Tracks AI-generation signals and GitHub Pages references.
